volumeTitle: Birds. Lysistrata. Women at the Thesmophoria
label: Birds (Section 963b - Section 1031)

sections.label: Section 963b
sections.translation: Why did you not reveal it to me before

sections.label: Section 965
sections.translation: I founded my city ?

sections.label: Section 965b
sections.translation: The divine spirit was against it .

sections.label: Section 966
sections.original: ἀλλʼ οὐδὲν οἷόν ἐστʼ ἀκοῦσαι τῶν ἐπῶν .
sections.translation: Well , I suppose there ' s nothing to do but hear the terms of the oracle .

sections.label: Section 967
sections.original: ἀλλʼ ὅταν οἰκήσωσι λύκοι πολιαί τε κορῶναι
sections.translation: But when the wolves and the white crows shall dwell together between Corinth and Sicyon ...

sections.label: Section 969
sections.original: τί οὖν προσήκει δῆτʼ ἐμοὶ Κορινθίων ;
sections.translation: But how do the Corinthians concern me ?

sections.label: Section 970
sections.original: ᾐνίξαθʼ ὁ Βάκις τοῦτο πρὸς τὸν ἀέρα .
sections.translation: It is the regions of the air that Bacis indicates in this manner . They must first sacrifice a white-fleeced goat to Pandora , and give the prophet who first reveals my words a good cloak and new sandals .

sections.label: Section 974
sections.translation: Does it say sandals there ?

sections.label: Section 974b
sections.translation: Look at the book .

sections.label: Section 975
sections.original: καὶ φιάλην δοῦναι , καὶ σπλάγχνων χεῖρʼ ἐπιπλῆσαι .
sections.translation: And besides this a goblet of wine and a good share of the entrails of the victim .

sections.label: Section 976
sections.translation: Of the entrails — does it say that ?

sections.label: Section 976b
sections.translation: Look at the book . If you do as I command , divine youth , you shall be an eagle among the clouds ; if not , you shall be neither turtle-dove , nor eagle , nor woodpecker .

sections.label: Section 980
sections.translation: Does it say all that ?

sections.label: Section 980b
sections.translation: Look at the book .

sections.label: Section 981
sections.original: οὐδὲν ἄρʼ ὅμοιός ἐσθʼ ὁ χρησμὸς τουτῳί ,
sections.translation: This oracle in no sort of way resembles the one Apollo dictated to me : If an impostor comes without invitation to annoy you during the sacrifice and to demand a share of the victim ,

sections.label: Section 985
sections.original: δὴ τότε χρὴ τύπτειν αὐτὸν πλευρῶν τὸ μεταξὺ —
sections.translation: apply a stout stick to his ribs .

sections.label: Section 986
sections.translation: You are drivelling .

sections.label: Section 986b
sections.translation: Look at the book . And don ' t spare him , were he an eagle from out of the clouds , were it Lampon himself or the great Diopithes .

sections.label: Section 989
sections.translation: Does it say that ?

sections.label: Section 989b
sections.translation: Look at the book

sections.label: Section 990
sections.translation: and go and hang yourself .

sections.label: Section 990b
sections.translation: Oh ! unfortunate wretch that I am . He departs .

sections.label: Section 991
sections.translation: Away with you , and take your prophecies elsewhere .

sections.label: Section 992
sections.translation: I have come to you . . .

sections.label: Section 992b
sections.translation: Yet another pest ! What have you come to do ? What ' s your plan ? What ' s the purpose of your journey ? Why these splendid buskins ?

sections.label: Section 995
sections.translation: I want to survey the plains of the air for you and to parcel them into lots .

sections.label: Section 996b
sections.translation: In the name of the gods , who are you ?

sections.label: Section 997b
sections.translation: Who am I ? Meton , known throughout Greece and at Colonus .

sections.label: Section 998b
sections.translation: What are these things ?

sections.label: Section 999b
sections.translation: Tools for measuring the air .

sections.label: Section 1000
sections.original: αὐτίκα γὰρ ἀήρ ἐστι τὴν ἰδέαν ὅλος
sections.translation: In truth , the spaces in the air have precisely the form of a furnace . With this bent ruler I draw a line from top to bottom ; from one of its points I describe a circle with the compass . Do you understand ?

sections.label: Section 1004
sections.translation: Not in the least .

sections.label: Section 1004b
sections.translation: With the straight ruler I set to work to inscribe

sections.label: Section 1005
sections.original: ὁ κύκλος γένηται σοι τετράγωνος κἀν μέσῳ
sections.translation: a square within this circle ; in its center will be the market-place , into which all the straight streets will lead , converging to this center like a star , which , although only orbicular , sends forth its rays in a straight line from all sides .

sections.label: Section 1009b
sections.translation: A regular Thales !

sections.label: Section 1010
sections.translation: Meton . . .

sections.label: Section 1010b
sections.translation: What d ' you want with me ?

sections.label: Section 1010c
sections.translation: I want to give you a proof of my friendship . Use your legs .

sections.label: Section 1012
sections.translation: Why , what have I to fear ?

sections.label: Section 1012b
sections.translation: It ' s the same here as in Sparta . Strangers are driven away , and blows rain down as thick as hail .

sections.label: Section 1014b
sections.translation: Is there sedition in your city ?

sections.label: Section 1015
sections.translation: No , certainly not .

sections.label: Section 1015b
sections.translation: What ' s wrong then ?

sections.label: Section 1015c
sections.translation: We are agreed to sweep all quacks and impostors far from our borders .

sections.label: Section 1017
sections.translation: Then I ' ll be going .

sections.label: Section 1017b
sections.original: νὴ Δίʼ ὡς οὐκ οἶδʼ ἂν εἰ
sections.translation: I ' m afraid it ' s too late . The thunder growls already .

sections.label: Section 1019
sections.translation: Oh , woe ! oh , woe !

sections.label: Section 1019b
sections.translation: I warned you .

sections.label: Section 1020
sections.translation: Now , be off , and do your surveying somewhere else .

sections.label: Section 1021
sections.translation: Where are the Proxeni ?

sections.label: Section 1021b
sections.translation: Who is this Sardanapalus ?

sections.label: Section 1022
sections.original: ἐπίσκοπος ἥκω δεῦρο τῷ κυάμῳ λαχὼν
sections.translation: I have been appointed by lot to come to Nephelococcygia as inspector .

sections.label: Section 1023b
sections.translation: An inspector ! and who sends you here , you rascal ?

sections.label: Section 1024b
sections.translation: A decree of Teleas .

sections.label: Section 1025b
sections.original: τί ; βούλει δῆτα τὸν μισθὸν λαβὼν
sections.translation: Will you just pocket your salary , do nothing , and get out ?

sections.label: Section 1026b
sections.translation: Indeed I will ; I am urgently needed to be at Athens to attend the Assembly ; for I am charged with the interests of Pharnaces .

sections.label: Section 1029
sections.original: ἄπιθι λαβών · ἔστιν δʼ ὁ μισθὸς οὑτοσί .
sections.translation: Take it then , and get on your way . This is your salary . He beats him .

sections.label: Section 1030
sections.translation: What does this mean ?

sections.label: Section 1030b
sections.translation: This is the assembly where you have to defend Pharnaces .

sections.label: Section 1031
sections.translation: You shall testify that they dare to strike me , the inspector .
